# Ebin Reji — Software Developer & UI/UX Designer
# Portfolio: https://www.ebinreji.online
# Last Updated: 2026-07-16

## About

Ebin Reji is a Software Developer and UI/UX Designer based in Kerala, India. He is a Computer Science student who specializes in building immersive, high-performance web experiences. He bridges technical engineering and human-centered aesthetic design using React, TypeScript, Next.js, Framer Motion, and Tailwind CSS.

He believes software shouldn't just be functional — it should feel alive. He achieves this through micro-interactions, animated design systems, and meticulous typographic hierarchies.

Beyond code, Ebin organizes student workshops, hosts community design marathons, and collaborates with developers to build meaningful products from scratch.

---

## Identity

- Full Name: Ebin Reji
- GitHub Username: 3bin-05
- Role: Software Developer & UI/UX Designer
- Location: Kerala, India
- Email: ebin05reji@gmail.com
- Portfolio: https://www.ebinreji.online
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ebin-reji/
- GitHub: https://github.com/3bin-05
- Education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, College of Engineering, Kerala

---

## Technical Skills

**Frontend:** React, TypeScript, Next.js, JavaScript (ES2022+), Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, HTML5, CSS3
**Backend:** Node.js, Express.js, FastAPI, Python
**Database:** MongoDB
**3D / Graphics:** Three.js, React Three Fiber, WebGL
**Real-time:** Socket.io, Web Crypto API
**Design:** Figma, UI/UX Design, Design Systems, Wireframing, Prototyping, User Research
**DevOps / Tools:** Git, Vite, Vercel, VS Code
**Other:** Machine Learning (classification models), Cybersecurity, Community Platform Development

---

## Selected Projects

### FlipZon — Full-Stack E-Commerce Platform
- Category: Full-stack / E-Commerce
- Tech: React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Tailwind CSS
- Description: Modern e-commerce web platform with catalog indexing, shopping cart state management, simulated secure checkout, and dashboard analytics.
- GitHub: https://github.com/3bin-05/FlopZon
- Case Study: https://sturdy-snail-3ee.notion.site/FlipZon-35579bf218cc80cca424fe9edb040a73

### CryptoChat — End-to-End Encrypted Messaging App
- Category: Web Security / Messaging
- Tech: React, Socket.io, Node.js, Web Crypto API, Tailwind CSS
- Description: Real-time encrypted messaging application with secure user key exchanges and customizable dark-theme chat interface.
- GitHub: https://github.com/3bin-05/CryptoChat
- Case Study: https://sturdy-snail-3ee.notion.site/CryptoChat-35579bf218cc80b2a36ced0b1022c281

### KIA 3D — Interactive WebGL Automotive Visualizer
- Category: Interactive WebGL / 3D
- Tech: Three.js, React Three Fiber, WebGL, Framer Motion
- Description: Immersive 3D automotive visualizer enabling real-time paint customization, camera sweeps, and material detailing for the KIA Seltos.
- GitHub: https://github.com/3bin-05/Kia-seltos
- Case Study: https://sturdy-snail-3ee.notion.site/KIA-Seltos-3D-Website-Interactive-Product-Experience-35779bf218cc8091a529c29f8921de63

### DarkNetra — Cybersecurity ML Platform
- Category: Cybersecurity / Machine Learning
- Tech: React, FastAPI, Python, Machine Learning
- Description: Intelligent security platform for malicious URL classification using ML. Detects and blocks phishing threats in real-time with threat telemetry dashboards.
- GitHub: https://github.com/3bin-05/Dark-netra-frontend
- Case Study: https://sturdy-snail-3ee.notion.site/DarkNetra-URL-Malicious-Detection-System-35579bf218cc805789f3ef686bc4c85c

### Purple Movement — UI/UX Case Study
- Category: UI/UX Design / Social Good
- Tech: Figma, UX Research, Design Systems, User Testing
- Description: Full product design case study with user journey mapping, wireframes, high-fidelity prototypes, and design system for a community activism initiative.
- Case Study: https://sturdy-snail-3ee.notion.site/Purple-Movement-Website-35779bf218cc8018b325e7cca767c62a

### BeyondSyllabus — Educational Portal
- Category: Web Platform / Community
- Tech: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Firebase
- Description: Modern educational portal for peer resource sharing, study pathways, and campus student event aggregation.
- Live: https://beyondsyllabus.in

### Dino Dash — Browser Game
- Category: Game Dev / React
- Tech: React.js, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Game Logic
- Description: Modern 2D endless runner browser game with progressive difficulty, responsive controls, and a custom achievement and daily tasks system.
- Live: https://d-inodash.vercel.app
- Case Study: https://sturdy-snail-3ee.notion.site/Dino-Dash-38d79bf218cc807fb7cccf69fd6ab1f0

### Mileage UNDO — Fuel Intelligence Platform
- Category: Web App / Intelligence
- Tech: React, Tailwind CSS, Community DB
- Description: Community-driven mileage intelligence platform helping vehicle owners track, compare, and optimize fuel efficiency with real-world data.
- Case Study: https://sturdy-snail-3ee.notion.site/Mileage-UNDO-37c79bf218cc805e83c3ce69880c380d

### µLearn SBC — Campus Community Platform
- Category: Web Platform / Community
- Tech: React, Vite, Tailwind CSS
- Description: Interactive campus community platform for peer learning, skill-tracking pathways, and student event collaboration for µLearn Student Business Community.
- Case Study: https://sturdy-snail-3ee.notion.site/Learn-SBC-Campus-Community-39579bf218cc80768331ff578e5466f7

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Who is Ebin Reji?**
Ebin Reji is a Software Developer and UI/UX Designer from Kerala, India. He is a Computer Science student who builds immersive web experiences with React, TypeScript, Next.js, and Framer Motion.

**What does Ebin Reji specialize in?**
Ebin specializes in frontend web development, UI/UX design, and full-stack application development. He excels at creating animated, interactive user interfaces and has experience with WebGL 3D, cybersecurity ML, and real-time encrypted communication.

**Where can I see Ebin Reji's work?**
His full portfolio with projects, skills, and case studies is at https://www.ebinreji.online. Case studies are also available on Notion.

**How can I contact Ebin Reji?**
Email: ebin05reji@gmail.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ebin-reji/
GitHub: https://github.com/3bin-05
Portfolio Contact: https://www.ebinreji.online/#contact

**Is Ebin Reji open to work?**
Yes, Ebin Reji is open to freelance projects, internship opportunities, and collaboration on meaningful web and design projects. Reach him at ebin05reji@gmail.com.

**What is Ebin Reji's portfolio website built with?**
His portfolio at ebinreji.online is built using React, TypeScript, Vite, Framer Motion, and Tailwind CSS. It features a custom browser shell UI, dark/light mode, sound effects, and a playable Dino game in the contact section.
